description: You are a robotics engineer provided with a Webots simulation arena containing an e-puck robot and obstacles. Create a Python obstacle avoidance controller for the robot at /home/ga/webots_projects/epuck_obstacle/controllers/obstacle_avoider/obstacle_avoider.py. The controller must utilize the e-puck's proximity sensors (ps0-ps7) and motors ('left wheel motor' and 'right wheel motor') to detect and avoid obstacles during the simulation. Save the updated Webots world to /home/ga/Desktop/epuck_avoidance.wbt.
